recentArticles.title: Tyga to Make Feature Film Debut in Coming-of-Age Drama Alongside ‘Outer Banks’ Star Madison Bailey - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Tyga to Make Feature Film Debut in Coming-of-Age Drama Alongside ‘Outer Banks’ Star Madison Bailey. In addition to starring in a lead role, the rapper is also cowriting and producing the film, titled *Baby, You're a Star*. Tyga will star alongside *Outer Banks*‘ Madison Bailey, Ashton Sanders, Mike Epps, Apollonia, Clifton Powell, Patrick Cage and David Alan Grier. The film’s storyline hits home with Tyga, which will follow an aspiring music artst determined to overcome life’s obstacles to reach stardom. “Blending music, nostalgia and raw emotional stakes, the film aims to capture the spirit of a generation on the brink of cultural change,” a press release for *Baby, You’re a Star* states. Production for the movie is currently underway in Portland, Ore. Tyga has been a rap staple for nearly 15 years since his breakout Billboard Hot 100 top 10 hit “Rack City,” which reached No. 7 on the chart in early 2012. Visit Billboard Pro for music business news.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導饒舌歌手Tyga將首次主演電影《Baby, You're a Star》，並參與編劇與製作，內容與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: Ziggy Marley Shares Why He Decided to Release His New Album Exclusively on Vinyl & CDs - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Ziggy Marley Shares Why He Decided to Release His New Album Exclusively on Vinyl & CDs. In a new episode of *Billboard*'s *Takes Us Out*, Marley talks about his creative process, *Yo Gabba GabbaLand!* cameo and his love of sports over a vegan meal. Over their meal, the duo talk about Marley’s upcoming album, collecting vinyl and being vulnerable in music. “I’m only vegan part-time,” Marley jokes. Marley is releasing his new album, *Brightside*, in an unconventional way. He attributes his decision to release his album this way to seeing how music was made when he was growing up, especially with his father, the late legend Bob Marley. “I grew up around seeing records being manufactured, vinyl from the conception to the final product,” Marley explains. “The most important vinyl is the first vinyl I bought,” Marley says before naming an album that was surely many collectors’ first: *Thriller*. “[I was] also getting some sparks of creativity, you know, being on a movie set,” Marley says.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導主要關於Ziggy Marley決定以黑膠和CD形式獨家發行新專輯《Brightside》的原因，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: BTS stays at No. 1 on the charts — and thwarts Ye in the process - South Carolina Public Radio
recentArticles.snippet: Three albums debut in the top five of this week's *Billboard* albums chart. Last week, a No. 1 debut for BTS's *Arirang* seemed as inevitable as the tides: The K-pop boy band didn't have much competition beyond country star Luke Combs (whose *The Way I Am* debuted at No. 2), and the group had already banked six No. 1 albums in its career. This week, *Arirang*'s continued chart dominance seemed like less of a given, seeing as how a huge percentage of its first-week numbers came from album sales (which don't carry over from week to week), while the latest round of debuts figured to be similarly formidable. It needed those sales, too, because three albums debut just behind it in this week's top five, led by Ye — the rapper formerly known as Kanye West — and his long-delayed new release *Bully*, which debuts at No. 2. Aided by a new video that premiered on April 1 — and in line for *another* chart boost after Langley's album *Dandelion* drops this Friday — "Choosin' Texas" is this week's most-streamed song.
recentArticles.summary: BTS stays at No. 1 on the charts — and thwarts Ye in the process - South Carolina Public Radio

recentArticles.title: Sommelier Fabien Jacob on When the Wine List Really Works - FSR magazine
recentArticles.snippet: Mon Chou Chou’s wine program is built for the room and clientele it actually has—a French brasserie in a busy district, serving a broad mix of guests in a high-volume environment. Mon Chou Chou’s wine program is built for the room and clientele it actually has—a French brasserie in a busy district, serving a broad mix of guests in a high-volume environment. The dining room, Jacob says, is built for guests who range from confident wine drinkers to people who would rather not pronounce a French appellation out loud. “I would prioritize a wine list that is easily digestible for the customer,” Jacob says. At Mon Chou Chou, the NA program includes nonalcoholic beer, wine, and cocktails, and Jacob says the team approached product selection the same way they approach the rest of the list: by tasting broadly and choosing what fits the market, not his personal preference.
recentArticles.summary: Sommelier Fabien Jacob on When the Wine List Really Works - FSR magazine

recentArticles.title: Justin Bieber is headlining Coachella this month: How the pop star is forging a new path - Yahoo
recentArticles.snippet: ## After health struggles, a canceled tour and selling his catalog, Bieber is signaling a comeback with new music and intimate performances ahead of the festival. Before this month’s music festival, Bieber stepped out for a series of intimate, invite-only performances in Los Angeles. While it’s unclear whether Bieber’s Los Angeles shows offer a preview of his entire Coachella setlist, it’s worth noting that because Bieber sold the rights to his back catalog of music to all songs he released through 2021, he will not receive performance royalties for older tracks. Bieber’s small shows in Los Angeles weren’t his only performance ahead of Coachella: He also took the Grammys stage in February, where he stripped down to just shorts and socks to sing his *Swag* track “Yukon.” His wife, Hailey Bieber, was emotional in the audience as Bieber showed off a back tattoo that was supposedly a portrait of the Rhode Beauty founder.
recentArticles.summary: Justin Bieber is headlining Coachella this month: How the pop star is forging a new path - Yahoo

recentArticles.snippet: First-time Grammy Award-winning country music artist Zach Top joins the lineup of upcoming 2026 summer concerts at the Constellation Brands-Marvin Sands Performing Arts Center. recentArticles.title: Zion’s EP ‘The Perfect Melody II’ & More Best New Music Latin - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Zion’s EP ‘The Perfect Melody II’ & More Best New Music Latin. Plus, check out *Billboard*'s New Music Latin weekly playlist below! Colombia’s *vieja escuela* (old school) Andy Rivera joins forces with Juan Duque and ONIKX of *la nueva escuela* (new school) for the release of “Amar y Ya.” On the nearly three-minute track, produced by Sherman and FINE, the three artists sing about a love that’s pure and honest, declaring in the chorus: “After you, there is nothing/ With you, I lack nothing/ I feel like I have everything/ After you, there is nothing/ I want everything with you—don’t leave me longing.” Backed by an urban-tinged, suave Afrobeats rhythm, “Amar y Ya,” which translates to “love and that’s all,” combines the sweet melodious vocals of Rivera, Duque and ONIKX, giving the song that extra romantic touch.
recentArticles.summary: Zion’s EP ‘The Perfect Melody II’ & More Best New Music Latin - Billboard

recentArticles.title: Watch Michael Jackson Explode Into Global Icon and Predict His Solo Breakthrough in Final ‘Michael’ Biopic Trailer - billboard.com
recentArticles.snippet: # Watch Michael Jackson Explode Into Global Icon and Predict His Solo Breakthrough in Final ‘Michael’ Biopic Trailer. After nearly half a decade in development, the Michael Jackson biopic *Michael* is just weeks away from moonwalking onto screens around the world. To celebrate, Lionsgate dropped the final trailer for the anticipated movie that stars the late self-proclaimed King of Pop’s real-life nephew, Jaafar Jackson, in the titular role on Wednesday morning (April 8). The latest sneak peek at the movie opens with Jackson saying, “I’ve just got all these songs in my head,” as he stares at a cork board in the studio featured sketches, snippets of lyrics and index cards featuring the titles of some of the legendary *Thriller* songs that would make the former Jackson 5 member a solo mega-star, including “Wanna Be Startin’ Somethin’,” “Billie Jean,” “P.Y.T.,” “Human Nature” and the title track. “I just gotta get them out,” a smiling Jackson says as the strains of one of the album’s two No. 1 Billboard Hot 100 hits, “Beat It,” plays in the background.
recentArticles.summary: Watch Michael Jackson Explode Into Global Icon and Predict His Solo Breakthrough in Final ‘Michael’ Biopic Trailer - billboard.com

recentArticles.title: Dr. Dre joins Jay-Z as second hip-hop billionaire on Forbes' list - USA Today
recentArticles.snippet: Dr. Dre joins Jay-Z as second hip-hop billionaire on Forbes' list. # Dr. Dre joins Jay-Z as second hip-hop billionaire on Forbes' list. Snoop Dogg, Eminem honor Dr. Dre's 'mark on the world of music'. Snoop Dogg, Eminem and 50 Cent joined producer and entrepreneur Dr. Dre as his star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame was revealed. “I don’t chase money – I try to make the money chase me,” Dre told Forbes, who also ranked Dre as No. 20 on its list of the Greatest Self-Made Americans*.* “I’ve always been able to bet on myself, and whatever I do and wherever I go, I know I have my talent with me.”. After leaving Death Row Records, which he co-founded, Dre created Aftermath Entertainment and continued to work with Snoop Dogg, producing his debut "Doggystyle," and furthered the career of the late Tupac Shakur, collaborating on "California Love," and produced albums for Eminem and 50 Cent.

recentArticles.title: Morgan Jay to Host 2026 Golden Trailer Awards (Exclusive) - The Hollywood Reporter
recentArticles.snippet: # Morgan Jay to Host 2026 Golden Trailer Awards (Exclusive). * Share on Facebook&sdk=joey&display=popup&ref=plugin&src=share_button&app_id=1153511048447777&href=https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/movies/movie-news/morgan-jay-golden-trailer-awards-1236558651/). * Share on Whats App%20-%20https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/movies/movie-news/morgan-jay-golden-trailer-awards-1236558651/). * Send an Email&body=https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/movies/movie-news/morgan-jay-golden-trailer-awards-1236558651/%20-%20Morgan%20Jay%20to%20Host%202026%20Golden%20Trailer%20Awards%20(Exclusive)). * Share on Facebook&sdk=joey&display=popup&ref=plugin&src=share_button&app_id=1153511048447777&href=https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/movies/movie-news/morgan-jay-golden-trailer-awards-1236558651/). * Share on Whats App%20-%20https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/movies/movie-news/morgan-jay-golden-trailer-awards-1236558651/). * Send an Email&body=https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/movies/movie-news/morgan-jay-golden-trailer-awards-1236558651/%20-%20Morgan%20Jay%20to%20Host%202026%20Golden%20Trailer%20Awards%20(Exclusive)). Morgan Jay, the breakout standup comic known for his auto-tuned microphone and crowd work during performances, is set to host the 26th Golden Trailer Awards. The May 28 awards ceremony at the Saban Theatre in Beverly Hills will honor the best in Hollywood movie and TV/streaming series previews*,* including trailers, commercials and posters. The Golden Trailers Awards gig will see Jay work a room full of studio marketing execs, movie fans, celebrities and trailer editors. He doesn’t just perform to the audience—he pulls them into the experience, which makes him an ideal host for our night,” Evelyn Brady, Golden Trailer Awards executive director and co-founder, said in a statement. Beyond the hardware to be handed out, Golden Trailer Awards organizers are promising a “raucous” evening for the industry creatives set to fill the Saban Theatre.

recentArticles.title: How Michael Jackson’s Estate Has Quietly Funded His Three Kids' Lavish Lifestyle - Yahoo
recentArticles.snippet: # How Michael Jackson’s Estate Has Quietly Funded His Three Kids' Lavish Lifestyle. Michael Jackson’s estate has turned out to be a lucrative blessing for his three kids, and the legal documents are proving where the money is going. Paris Jackson, 28, is currently engaged in a legal battle with the executors of her late father’s estate, John Branca and John McClain, over alleged mismanagement of funds, lack of transparency, and high attorney fees, per *New York Post*. In October 2025, Paris was accused of “[blowing through [money] faster than Michael ever did,](https://www.yahoo.com/entertainment/celebrity/articles/paris-jackson-reportedly-blowing-her-205341464.html)” according to Rob Shuter’s *Naughty But Nice* Substack. Branca and McClain shared in legal documents, obtained by *Us Weekly*, Paris “has benefited more than anyone” from the lucrative Jackson estate, and they are frustrated that she’s pushing back. There is still no resolution in the Jackson family estate case, but it appears Paris is leading the fight with her brothers quietly showing support behind the scenes.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞資訊主要關於麥可·傑克森的遺產管理及其子女的法律糾紛，與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.snippet: # Paris Jackson Accuses MJ's Estate Executors of Using Dad's Fortune to Bully Her. ## Paris Jackson to MJ's Estate Executors You're Using My Dad's Fortune to Bully & Attack Me!!! **Paris Jackson** slammed the two executors in charge of her late father **Michael Jackson**’s estate ... According to court docs, obtained by TMZ, Paris and her legal team say the executors, **John Branca** and **John McClain**, are filing court documents that “mock and belittle” Michael’s only daughter. As TMZ previously reported, Paris and the executors **have been going** back and forth about payments made to third-party law firms who worked for the estate ... #### Paris Jackson Goes to Salon Amid Legal Drama With Michael's Estate. #### Michael Jackson Estate Accounting Report Shows $$$ Spent on Prince, Paris & Blanket. Paris Jackson   John Branca   Michael Jackson   John McClain   Celebrity News   RIP   Money   Celebrity Death   Exclusive   Fairly Legal.

recentArticles.title: Now cancer-free, 'Roastmaster' comic Jeff Ross still finds humor in loss - npr.org
recentArticles.snippet: **'Roastmaster' comic Jeff Ross finds humor in loss** **Known for his ruthless celebrity roasts, Ross turns inward in his Netflix special, *Take a Banana for the Ride*, which details the loss of his parents and grandfather.**. "Going bald is one thing, but people thinking that I was sick or weak, for some reason, that really bothered me," Ross says of being diagnosed with alopecia. Comedian Jeff Ross — aka the "Roastmaster General," who's participated in televised roasts of celebrities like Justin Bieber, Tom Brady and Joan Rivers — is not easily offended. But his new Netflix comedy special, *Take a Banana for the Ride,* is more personal and autobiographical.In it, he reflects on his family and childhood — including the loss of his mother, who died of cancer when he was a teen, and his father, who died of an aneurysm five years later. To him, it was like a tough guy's way of saying, "I love you.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇新聞主要報導喜劇演員Jeff Ross如何透過他的Netflix特輯，以幽默面對個人生命中的失落與挑戰。

recentArticles.title: Why The Meta $6M Verdict Is A “Joe Camel” Warning For Big Tech - Forbes
recentArticles.snippet: # Why The Meta $6M Verdict Is A “Joe Camel” Warning For Big Tech. ## By Tyler Chou, Esq. I was halfway across the world in Taiwan for Spring Break when the Meta $6M verdict broke: a Los Angeles jury had delivered a $6 million verdict against Meta and Google in a case involving social media’s impact on a young user’s mental health. As an attorney for the world’s largest creators, I view this ruling not as a financial hit, but as a structural shift in the legal landscape—one that mirrors the fall of Big Tobacco. How the Meta 6M Verdict Reshapes The Creator Economy. ### What Leaders Should Do Now. As the legal landscape shifts from "Fast" to "Slow," creators and brands should audit their strategy:. The path from immunity to accountability following this Meta $6M verdict is now clearly marked; the only question is how quickly the rest of the industry will be forced to walk it.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇報導主要探討Meta因社群媒體對年輕用戶心理健康的影響而被判賠600萬美元的案例，並將其視為科技巨頭法律責任的結構性轉變，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentReports.daily_summary: 今日搜集的新聞報導中，並未發現任何與周杰倫直接相關的內容。主要娛樂新聞焦點集中在Kanye West的音樂節爭議與其復出動態，以及Michael Jackson遺產處理的相關報導。
今天搜集到的新聞中，沒有任何關於周杰倫的報導。所有焦點集中在其他歐美娛樂新聞，例如麥可傑克森的遺產爭議、肯伊威斯特的音樂節風波與復出演出，以及其他社會與健康議題。因此，今日無周杰倫的相關焦點事件可供摘要。
周杰倫近日話題不斷，公開了英國古堡求婚昆凌的影片，引發熱議。其「嘉年華II」巡演首站杭州場吸引5萬人，首唱7首新歌，並斥資5億打造14公尺巨型機甲，場面震撼。Spotify也為他推出專屬互動體驗「16包廂」，成功吸引三倍新粉絲。
周杰倫「嘉年華II」巡演於杭州盛大開唱，不僅首唱7首新歌，更出動14公尺巨型機甲，吸引5萬粉絲狂嗨。他公開英國古堡求婚昆凌的影片引發熱議，女主播分析求婚細節更顯珍貴。此外，Spotify也為他推出專屬互動體驗「16包廂」，成功吸引三倍新粉絲。
